word: G4659 - σκυθρωπός - skythrōpós - skoo-thro-pos' - Of a sad countenance

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Of a sad countenance
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Adjective / பெயரடை
of a sad and gloomy countenance
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From σκυθρός skuthros (sullen) and a derivative of G3700; angry visaged, that is, gloomy or affecting a mournful appearance: - of a sad countenance.
